name: JoAi: Ingest Knowledge

description.en: Turn unstructured notes, transcripts, or articles into structured primitives such as action items, reminders, CRM contacts, memories, and goals.
description.de: Verwandle unstrukturierte Notizen, Transkripte oder Artikel in strukturierte Primitive wie Action Items, Erinnerungen, CRM-Kontakte, Erinnerungen und Ziele.

bot: Use this when the user shares raw notes, meeting transcripts, or long-form text and wants it automatically structured into useful primitives. Prefer this warp over manually creating many separate objects.

inputs.name: Content
inputs.bot: The full raw content to ingest. Keep original details because extraction quality depends on this.

inputs.name: Source Type
inputs.bot: Where the content comes from. Use meeting, note, context, article, email, chat, or webhook.

inputs.name: Source Provider
inputs.bot: Optional provider/origin such as zoom, google-meet, slack, or manual.

inputs.name: Source External ID
inputs.bot: Optional external reference ID used for deduplication.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: Optional title for this ingestion payload.

inputs.name: Primitives
inputs.bot: Optional comma-separated subset: memory, context, action_item, crm_contact, reminder, article, goal.

success.en: Ingestion queued. I am extracting structured primitives now.
success.de: Erfassung gestartet. Ich extrahiere jetzt strukturierte Primitive.
